intent: b2 — Vox promises the first turn at dusk; the doubt slips out.

promise.text: DUSK, friends! At dusk the great wheel makes its first turn of the year — riveted by our own apprentices!

aside.text: …assuming Magister Brontes stops glaring at that boiler. Not that I said that.

choices.label: Ask what's wrong with the boiler

deflect.text: Wrong? NOTHING is wrong. Go ask the machine show — and tell them Vox sent nobody.
